target.sql_fulltext: SELECT ENTITY_CODE, ENTITY_NAME, X.PERIOD , X.DAY , X.AVG_0, X.STDDEV_0 FROM ( SELECT ENTITY_CODE, ENTITY_NAME, PERIOD, DAY, ROUND(AVG(M38673),4) AVG_0, ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP(M38673),4) STDDEV_0 FROM ( SELECT 'CN='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.CN||';Municipio='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Municipio||';Operator='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Operator||';Region='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Region||';SiteType='||DA_R4G_SITE_ADD_INFO.SiteType||';Site_Name='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Site_Name||';Vendor='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Vendor||';eNodeBName='||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.eNodeBName ENTITY_CODE,D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.CN||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Municipio||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Operator||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Region||';'||DA_R4G_SITE_ADD_INFO.SiteType||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Site_Name||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Vendor||';'||D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.eNodeBName ENTITY_NAME,D_TIME.HOUR PERIOD,D_TIME.DAY_OF_WEEK AS DAY , SUM(M38673) M38673 FROM F_R4G_ENODEB, D_TIME, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB,DA_R4G_SITE_ADD_INFO WHERE D_TIME.DAY_OF_WEEK IN ('1','2','3','4','5','6','7') AND F_R4G_ENODEB.AA_r4g_site_add_info_key=DA_R4G_SITE_ADD_INFO.AA_r4g_site_add_info_key AND F_R4G_ENODEB.entity_key=D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.entity_key AND D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.entity_type_name = 'R4G_eNodeB' AND D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.entity_key = F_R4G_ENODEB.entity_key GROUP BY DA_R4G_SITE_ADD_INFO.SiteType, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Region, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Operator, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Vendor, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.CN, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Municipio, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.eNodeBName, D_ENTITY_R4G_ENODEB.Site_Name,D_TIME.REPORT_DATE_TIME,D_TIME.HOUR ,D_TIME.DAY_OF_WEEK) GROUP BY ENTITY_CODE, ENTITY_NAME, PERIOD, DAY) X WHERE ( X.AVG_0 IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY ENTITY_CODE, X.DAY, X.PERIOD

operation.name: TABLE ACCESS
operation.predicates: ("D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=1 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=2 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=3 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=4 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=5 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=6 OR "D_TIME"."DAY_OF_WEEK"=7)

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets with Encodings
stat.desc: Number of rowsets with encodings

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Encodings
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging encodings

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets with Encodings
stat.desc: Number of rowsets with encodings

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Encodings
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging encodings

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Build Size
stat.desc: Size of the build input in bytes

stat.name: Build Row Count
stat.desc: Number of rows for the build

stat.name: Fan-out
stat.desc: Number of partitions used to split both inputs

stat.name: Slot Size
stat.desc: Size of an in-memory hash-join slot

stat.name: Total Build Partitions
stat.desc: Total number of build partitions

stat.name: Total Cached Partitions
stat.desc: Total number of build partitions left in-memory before probing

stat.name: Multi-pass Partition Pairs
stat.desc: Total number of partition pairs processed multi-pass

stat.name: Total Spilled Probe Rows
stat.desc: Total number of rows from the probe spilled to disk (excluding buffering)

stat.name: Columnar Encodings Leveraged
stat.desc: Total number of encodings leveraged for probing during probe phase

stat.name: Columnar Encodings Observed
stat.desc: Total number of encodings observed during probe phase

stat.name: Slow metadata bytes
stat.desc: Size of slow metadata in bytes

stat.name: Eligible bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes eligible for offload

stat.name: Filtered bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes returned after offload

stat.name: SI saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by storage index

stat.name: Flash cache bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes fetched from flash cache

stat.name: Partial flash cache and disk bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes where IO was partially fetched from flash cache and disk

stat.name: Cell passthru IO bytes
stat.desc: Total cell passthru IO bytes

stat.name: Block IO bytes
stat.desc: Total block IO bytes

stat.name: Columnar cache saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by columnar cache

stat.name: Dynamic Scan Tasks on Thread
stat.desc: Number of dynamic scan tasks completed by thread
